short_description: Multi-disciplinary chartered accountancy and advisory firm with a dedicated corporate finance and EOT practice for owner-managed and founder-led businesses.
notable_work: Advised shareholders of Nuaware on its sale to Exclusive Networks
advised Roycian on the MBO of McAndrew Martin
led the Equal Experts transition to employee ownership
advised RS Aqua on its sale to General Oceans.
long_description: Moore Kingston Smith is a multi-disciplinary chartered accountancy and advisory firm headquartered in London and part of the Moore Global network. Its corporate finance team of around 35 professionals supports owner-managed and founder-led businesses on M&A transactions, private equity investments and growth capital raises, with a dedicated EOT practice for employee ownership transitions.

short_description: UK top-30 chartered accountancy firm with a dedicated Strategic Corporate Finance team advising owner-managed businesses on sales, MBOs and EOT transitions.

key_people.name: Simon Blake
key_people.title: Partner – Head of Strategic Corporate Finance

notable_work: Advised Panoramic Growth Equity on its investment into Big Drop Brewing Co
advised on sale of AID Industrial to 3sun Group
advised on sale of Jack in the Box Nursery to Bright Stars Nursery Group
acted as lead advisor on the sale of Derbyshire Veterinary Services to IVC.
long_description: Price Bailey is a UK chartered accountancy and advisory firm founded in 1938, with offices across East Anglia, London and the Channel Islands. Its Strategic Corporate Finance team advises owner-managed businesses on disposals, mergers and acquisitions, management and employee buy-outs, valuations, private equity fundraising and debt advisory, typically on transactions in the lower mid-market.
primary_contact_role: Partner – Head of Strategic Corporate Finance

short_description: Independent UK law firm and Employee Ownership Association specialist adviser with a large corporate M&A and EOT practice.
notable_work: Advised shareholders of MACD on its acquisition by Foconis (Main Capital Partners portfolio company)
advised Optimum RX Lens Specialists on its transition to an Employee Ownership Trust
supported Kent Community Health NHS Foundation Trust on the sale of Sandwich Dental Service
EOT clients include Crystal Doors, Granby Marketing Solutions, Day Architectural, DJS Research and The SEO Works.
long_description: Brabners is an independent UK law firm with offices in Liverpool, Manchester, Leeds, Preston and London. Its corporate team advises on business sales, private equity transactions, MBOs and EOT matters. The firm holds 'specialist adviser' status from the Employee Ownership Association and is ranked in The Legal 500 for corporate and commercial matters.
primary_contact_role: Partner – Head of Employee Ownership Trust team

short_description: Specialist UK law firm focused solely on employee ownership and EOT transitions, itself 100% employee-owned.
notable_work: Advised Synergy Vision, TensCare, The Rooflight Company, Orms Designers & Architects, Artemis Marketing, Hattons of London and Interact CC on transitions to Employee Ownership Trusts.
long_description: Postlethwaite Solicitors is a specialist boutique law firm founded in 2003 and based in London and Leeds, focused exclusively on employee ownership and employee share schemes. It has completed over 200 EOT transitions and is itself 100% employee-owned. The firm is top-ranked by Chambers & Partners and The Legal 500 in employee ownership and employee share schemes.

short_description: Marlow-based corporate finance boutique specialising in Employee Ownership Trust transactions and SME business sales.
notable_work: Advised TTP Group on its £276 million transition to an Employee Ownership Trust in 2021 – one of the largest EOT conversions by value to date
recent EOT mandates include a London-based recruitment business and a Cambridgeshire veterinary practice.
long_description: Founded in 2019 and based in Marlow, Buckinghamshire, RVE Corporate Finance is a boutique corporate finance advisory firm specialising in Employee Ownership Trust transactions, with additional experience in SME business sales. The team of chartered accountants, lawyers and corporate finance advisers previously worked together at PwC Corporate Finance. RVE is a member of the ICAEW Corporate Finance Faculty and the Employee Ownership Association.

short_description: Independent Yorkshire-based chartered accountancy firm with a dedicated corporate finance and EOT advisory practice.

key_people.name: Peter Wilmer
key_people.title: Senior Partner & Head of Corporate Finance

notable_work: Advised PBA Applied Ecology, Home Utility Group, Specialised Movers, Essential Recruitment and Manvers Engineering on their transitions to Employee Ownership Trusts.
long_description: Hawsons is an independent chartered accountancy firm with offices in Sheffield, Doncaster and Northampton. Its corporate finance team provides lead advisory services on business sales, MBOs and EOT transitions, with a particular focus on owner-managed businesses.
primary_contact_role: Senior Partner & Head of Corporate Finance

short_description: UK corporate finance advisory firm helping SME owners and business leaders buy, sell or fund the growth of a business.
notable_work: Advised on sale of GoProposal to Sage, Pukka Herbs to Unilever, Vouchercloud to Groupon, The Safeguarding Company to Tes, Senta to IRIS, Canopy Simulations to Michelin, ABEC to Magnesium Capital and the £28m MBO of Now Education.
long_description: Founded in 2011, Shaw & Co is a UK corporate finance advisory firm with offices in Bristol, Birmingham, Glasgow, London and Manchester. The firm advises SME owners on exit strategies, business valuations, acquisitions, mergers, management buy-outs and funding, and is part of the Ecovis global network.

short_description: FCA-regulated boutique M&A advisory firm serving owner-managers and entrepreneurs on exits and mid-market transactions.
notable_work: Advised on sale of BCS Consulting to Accenture out of an EOT
sales of Pirtek to Franchise Brands, Delta Motorsport to Cosworth, DW Windsor to Luceco, ecube to Unical Aviation, and JR Industries to SDI.
long_description: Founded in 1996, Bishopsgate is an FCA-regulated boutique M&A advisory firm with advisors based across London, Milton Keynes and Stamford. The firm has advised on over 250 deals with combined value above £3bn, covering company sales, acquisitions, private equity transactions, management buy-outs and EOT exits.

short_description: Manchester-based independent corporate finance boutique specialising in mid-market M&A advisory.
notable_work: Advised shareholders and management of ZELUS
advised on sale of Aston Services Group to Atlas FM
advised Rockpool Investments on its backing of Harley Academy.
long_description: Established in 1976, Rickitt Mitchell is an independent corporate finance boutique based in Manchester. The firm has completed over 300 transactions with combined value of more than £4bn, acting for private and public company shareholders, management teams, entrepreneurs and equity investors. It is a member of M&A Worldwide, a global network of independent financial advisory firms.

short_description: UK chartered accountancy and business advisory firm with dedicated corporate finance, transaction services and business succession teams.
notable_work: Published technical guidance on business succession and exit options
transaction services team advised shareholders of Comms365 on SPA and vendor assistance.
long_description: Saffery is a UK chartered accountancy and business advisory firm with multiple UK offices and international reach through the Nexia network. Services include corporate finance, transaction services, tax and business advisory, with published technical content on business succession and exit options covering trade sale, MBO and EOT.

short_description: UK-headquartered independent corporate finance firm advising exclusively on sell-side M&A to mid-market companies.
notable_work: Over 400 sell-side M&A transactions with combined value above £3 billion since 1988.
long_description: Founded in 1988, Cavendish advises private companies, financial institutions and listed companies on sell-side M&A transactions, typically in the mid-market. The firm operates from offices in London and Edinburgh.

short_description: Dedicated UK mid-market advisory team of Rothschild & Co providing M&A, debt and special situations advice.
notable_work: Advised shareholders of Right Legal Group on growth investment from Vespa Capital
advised GFS on its sale to ILG
mandates referenced for Mr & Mrs Smith, Tryzens, M&I Materials, Ultra Energy and AccountsIQ.
long_description: Arrowpoint Advisory is the dedicated UK mid-market advisory team of Rothschild & Co, providing M&A, debt advisory and special situations advice to founders, management teams and investors. The team has delivered over 900 transactions over 25 years and has offices in London and Manchester.

short_description: Global technology investment bank providing M&A and growth capital advisory to technology companies and investors.
notable_work: Advised MSQ Partners on its sale to LDC
advised on sale of Iress' UK Mortgages business to Bain Capital Tech Opportunities
advised on sales of Oliver to You & Mr Jones, Namics to Merkle and Solita to Apax Digital.
long_description: Founded in 1999, GP Bullhound is an independent global technology investment bank headquartered in London, with offices across Europe, the US and Asia. The firm advises technology companies and investors on M&A and growth capital transactions.

short_description: Independent UK law firm with a top-tier corporate and M&A practice serving private and public company transactions.
notable_work: Advised a subsidiary of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority on the sale of 33 UK Marriott hotels
advised Fasadgruppen on acquisition of Clear Line Holdings
advised senior management on rollover arrangements in the offer for Loungers plc
advised on sale of Biral to Senseca.
long_description: Burges Salmon is an independent UK law firm headquartered in Bristol with additional offices in London and Edinburgh. Its corporate and M&A team advises on private M&A, public takeovers, reorganisations, demergers, private equity transactions and equity capital markets for UK and international clients.

short_description: London-based wealth manager and part of the Schroders Group with a dedicated business owners team advising before, during and after a business exit.
notable_work: Published case studies include advising a client on estate planning and investment structuring following the sale of a family-owned business and advising an entrepreneur on reducing concentration risk after a business exit.
long_description: Cazenove Capital is the UK and Channel Islands wealth management business of Schroders, headquartered in London. Its dedicated business owners team advises entrepreneurs and their families on wealth structuring, tax planning and investment planning before, during and after a business exit.
